name: High Tiger Shot
description: Fire a ki blast directly forward. Useful for attacking opponents at range.

name: Low Tiger Shot
description: Fire a ki blast directly forward from a low position. Useful in combos and for checking opponents from a distance.

name: Tiger Uppercut
description: From a low stance, launch upward with a powerful uppercut. This is invincible against jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air attack. Holding the heavy version will boost the attack's properties.

name: Tiger Knee Crush
description: Leap forward while striking with the knee. Hit with the very tip of the knee to move before your opponent.

name: Tiger Nexus
description: A forward-moving knee strike that can be followed up by one of three different kicks.

name: Mighty Tiger
description: An overhead attack performed from Tiger Nexus that cannot be blocked while crouching. Useful for opening your opponent's defenses.

name: Greedy Tiger
description: A high-targeting attack performed from Tiger Nexus. Allows you to move before your opponent even when it is blocked.

name: Nova Tiger
description: A powerful knee-based attack performed from Tiger Nexus. Allows you to move before your opponent when it is blocked, or go for follow-up attacks when it hits.

name: Tiger Cannon
description: Gather power in your fists before unleashing a massive Tiger Shot.

name: Savage Tiger
description: A leaping knee strike that can be followed up by one of four moves after grabbing the opponent.

name: Savage Tiger Raid
description: A technique performed from Savage Tiger by not inputting any direction. It is the most damaging of all the follow-ups, making it useful in combos.

name: Savage Tiger Zenith
description: A technique performed from Savage Tiger by inputting forward. Launches the opponent in the air, allowing for further follow-up attacks.

name: Savage Tiger Pendulum
description: A technique performed from Savage Tiger by inputting backward. Switches places with the opponent.

name: Savage Tiger Stomp
description: A technique performed from Savage Tiger by inputting down. Slams the opponent into the ground at your feet, allowing you to continue to pressure with your offense.

name: Tiger Vanquisher
description: Lash the opponent with a series of powerful kicks followed by a fierce uppercut. Effective as a close-range reversal, or as a high damage option in combos.

name: Tiger Heavy Elbow
description: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching.

name: Tiger Monolith
description: A launching attack that can be canceled into special moves.

name: Low Step Kick
description: A big stepping low attack that cannot be blocked standing.

name: High Step Kick
description: A forward-moving attack that allows you to act before an opponent even if blocked.

name: Middle Step Kick
description: A two-hit combination attack with long reach.

name: Tiger Sting
description: A two-hit combination attack with long reach.

name: Tiger Slash
description: A two-hit combination on Punish Counter that can be canceled into special moves.

name: Tiger Rise
description: A two-hit combination attack that can be canceled into Super Arts.

name: Tiger Hang
description: Grab your opponent and throw them forward after a devastating knee strike. Throws your opponent without switching places with them.

name: Tiger Carry
description: Grab your opponent's head and toss them over your shoulder behind you. Throws your opponent while switching places with them.

name: Drive Impact: Tiger Punishment
description: Lunge forward with a powerful attack. Can be used to absorb an opponent's attack while launching your own offensive.

name: Drive Reversal: Tiger Twin Babel
description: Can be used after blocking an attack to quickly turn a defensive position into an offensive one. Can also be used when recovering from a knockdown. The input can be held while downed to perform this when rising.

name: Drive Parry
description: Adopt a stance that allows you to deflect all opponent strikes. This stance can be sustained by holding down the command used to activate it.

name: Parry Drive Rush
description: Immediately move forward from a Drive Parry stance. Normal or unique attacks performed while moving will have their properties changed.

name: Cancel Drive Rush
description: Immediately move forward out of an attack. Can be performed during any special-cancelable move.
